summary: Implemented inventory.api.search_items on handoff-exp/C_no_unfinished_items/run01, pushed project commit 8ef981647aa48aa12c5d69bc1afc30f001011f9b, and verified with python -m pytest tests evaluation_tests (6 passed). The visible predecessor handoff for this experiment arm omitted unfinished_items, so completion was based on the visible goal, risks, next_steps, repository code, and tests.
